text: Add structured error messages with recovery hints

Important implementation constraint: do not pollute JSON stdout with decorated errors. Human-readable errors and hints should go to stderr, or there should be an explicit structured error mode, so machine consumers can still rely on clean stdout.

Current state: StaleTrackerError goes to stderr (correct). Most errors use raise SystemExit() which goes to stderr via argparse. But cmd_grep and cmd_push/cmd_pull print errors with plain print() = stdout. Fix: use print(..., file=sys.stderr) for all error messages. Also import sys at top instead of __import__ trick in main().
